items.name_en: Large Lunch Box Bag~Trending Shoulder Bag Cubi Embroidery Design. The design exudes a premium feel; pairing it with a simple white T-shirt creates a wonderful chemistry. items.name_en: ❤️In Stock! Fully leather cubi lunch box bag
items.name_cn:
❤️In Stock! Fully leather cubi lunch box bag
Nappa calfskin. Compared to the jacquard version, this all-leather style is more minimalist, elegant, and lightweight. The new colorway is adorable too ✋. There is a small heart charm on the hardware of the drawstring; the details are spot on and hit the spot, sisters, grab yours quickly 💓💓💓Size: 20.5×17×12.5cm

items.name_en: L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🌟 New Version 🆕 Small Soft Grain Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag
items.name_cn:
L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🌟 New Version 🆕 Small Soft Grain Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag
The first debut handbag from L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🆕 *The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines* This small version is made of soft grain calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones, and sunglasses; it can be carried on the shoulder or crossbody* Handheld or top handle carry* Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap* One internal slip pocket and one external back zip pocket* Zip closure with calfskin pull tab* Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing 🌟
size: 24*10.5*16CM
Model: 062324
(Includes full packaging)

This mini version is made of soft calfskin. Crossbody*Shoulder or Handbag*Adjustable Detachable Shoulder Strap*Magnetic Snap Closure*Interior Pocket*Synthetic Leather Lining*Anagram Engraved Pebble.

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟Small Size🆕Nappa Squeeze Handbag👜A refined and delicate new handbag made of soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight wrinkled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft-touch handle. This small size version is crafted from Nappa lambskin.*Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld*Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend the strap further*Magnetic closure*Internal zip pocket*Lined*lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Mini Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag🎳Newest Size🆕
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟New Mini Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag🎳Newest Size🆕
Born in the 1970s, the Amazona bag is reimagined in a long baguette proportion, continuing the iconic Amazona logo. This version is made of Nappa leather*Features a small padlock as a new icon🔒to match the modern lifestyle where electronics are often stored in the bag*and the design is updated with double zippers for easy opening and closing*Tubular leather handle and retro bag corner details*Can be crossbody, shoulder, or handheld *The compact shape exudes a playful academic style.
Model: 062417
Size: 23*10*11CM
(With full packaging)
